message:
Update beads issue tracker with 11 new tasks

Add issue entries covering test and implementation tasks for multiple
subsystems:

- Count-Min sketch: unit tests for correctness, error bounds, hash
  independence
- NitroSketch: unit tests for accuracy, sampling rates, HyperLogLog
  cardinality
- Streaming sketches: E2E test under sustained agent output load
- Zygote process: unit tests for lifecycle, COW page sharing, fork
  errors; E2E test for crash recovery and cold-start fallback
- Prediction model: unit tests for accuracy, online learning,
  confidence calibration
- Scheduling pipeline: E2E test with 10 agents and mixed workloads
- Choreography DSL: design task for DSL and endpoint projection
  compiler; runtime implementation with message passing; unit tests
  for EPP correctness and deadlock freedom; E2E test for multi-agent
  code review workflow

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
